maxUsers.title: User Limit Reached
maxUsers.message: Your current plan allows up to {{limit}} users. Upgrade to {{requiredPlan}} to add more users.

maxClients.title: Client Limit Reached
maxClients.message: Your current plan allows up to {{limit}} clients. Upgrade to {{requiredPlan}} to add more clients.

maxRoles.title: Role Limit Reached
maxRoles.message: Your current plan allows up to {{limit}} roles. Upgrade to {{requiredPlan}} to create more roles.

auditLogs.title: Audit Logs Not Available
auditLogs.message: Audit logs are available on the {{requiredPlan}} plan.

advancedPermissions.title: Advanced Permissions Not Available
advancedPermissions.message: Advanced permissions are available on the {{requiredPlan}} plan.
